description_long: This object consists of three wooden storage crates stacked together, each constructed from planks with visible metal fasteners at the corners. The crates have rectangular cut-out handles on the sides for easy lifting and transport. Prominent warning labels are affixed to the sides, including 'HANDLE WITH CARE', 'fragile', and a pictorial guide on how to lift correctly, suggesting the contents may be delicate or heavy. The wood appears weathered and slightly worn, with some discoloration and scuff marks near the base, indicating frequent use or movement. The crates are hollow, as evidenced by the open handles and the visible interior shadows. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for industrial, warehouse, or urban storage and transport scenarios.
description: A group of three weathered wooden storage crates with metal fasteners, cut-out handles, and warning labels such as 'HANDLE WITH CARE' and 'fragile'. The crates are stacked and show signs of frequent use.
description_view_0: Front view showing three crates, two on the bottom and one stacked on top, with visible warning labels and lifting instructions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain wooden surfaces and cut-out handles, with no visible labels or signage.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the stacked arrangement and the unmarked wooden panels of the crates.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the 'HANDLE WITH CARE' label and partial visibility of the other warning signs.
